---
title: "Vice-Admiral Edmund Yonge R.N."
---

## Vice-Admiral Edmund Yonge R.N.

**Dates:** (1795-1868)

### Description

younger brother of the Rev. John Yonge of Puslinch

### Biography

He married (1835) Jane Ley Bennett, and had one son, James Edmund (b.1843).

### Letters

- Letter from [late 1885?]
- Letter from Thursday 1st Oct [1857]
- Letter from 26 Septr 1857

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
